summary: All Beat-1 deliverables for Build Step 4 are already in place: /api/prediction-options uses Anthropic tool-use on claude-sonnet-4-6 wrapped in withBackoff and emits framing+options through the NDJSON EnvelopeEncoder; PredictionOptions.tsx renders the PRD §3.2 layout (header "Your prediction · 1 of 2" + End button, numbered option rows with badges, single-row "Answer in your own words…" textarea capturing prediction.freeText); prototype-store.chooseLearn() POSTs to the endpoint, parses the envelope, and falls back to the concept registry on failure; End wires to resetArc returning the arc to idle. No code change needed.
evidence: src/app/api/prediction-options/route.ts:11-126 — Sonnet 4.6 model id, emit_prediction_beat tool with framing/options schema and misconceptionTag enum [allSettled, default-timeout, truth], withBackoff(client.messages.create), EnvelopeEncoder meta/data/error/done, ENVELOPE_CONTENT_TYPE response

src/components/prototype/PredictionOptions.tsx:42-90 — header row 'Your prediction · 1 of 2' + ghost End→resetArc, numbered option buttons (idx+1 badge), rows=1 textarea with placeholder 'Answer in your own words…', Enter submits recordPrediction({freeText})

src/lib/prototype-store.tsx:267-312 — chooseLearn() fetches /api/prediction-options, parseEnvelope onData captures framing/options, registry fallback preserved when live payload missing/empty, appends '<prediction-options/>' message
npm run lint → 0 errors, 2 unrelated warnings in chat/Greeting & chat/SparkIndicator
